info.name: Schedula API — ECU Seed
info.description:
Full API collection wired to the ECU seed data.

**Credentials (from seed-ecu.mjs):**
- Coordinator: anaselhaag@gmail.com / Schedula@123
- All staff (professors & TAs): <email>@ecu.schedula / Schedula@123
- Example professor: mohammad.ismail@ecu.schedula / Schedula@123
- Example TA: yara.mahmoud@ecu.schedula / Schedula@123

**Quick start:**
1. Run seed: `node --env-file=.env scripts/seed-ecu.mjs`
2. Run '03 Sign In (Coordinator)' — Postman cookie jar captures auth_token + refresh_token.
3. All coordinator routes work immediately after sign-in.
4. To test staff routes: run '03b Sign In (Staff)' first.
5. 'No Auth — Expect 401' folder proves security guards without any setup.

request.description: Creates a new coordinator. In dev (no email server), the response includes verificationToken — auto-saved to {{verifyToken}}. Run 02 next.

response.name: 201 Created
409 Already exists

request.description: Uses {{verifyToken}} saved from Sign Up. Only needed for new accounts — seeded accounts are pre-verified.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Invalid/expired token

exec: if (res.ok) console.log('Signed in as coordinator:', res.user.email);

request.description: Signs in as the seeded coordinator (anaselhaag@gmail.com / Schedula@123). Sets httpOnly cookies auth_token (30 min) and refresh_token (7 days). All coordinator routes work after this.

exec: if (res.ok) console.log('Signed in as professor:', res.user.email);

request.description: Signs in as a seeded professor (mohammad.ismail@ecu.schedula / Schedula@123). Use before testing Staff routes.

exec: if (res.ok) console.log('Signed in as TA:', res.user.email);

request.description: Signs in as a seeded TA (yara.mahmoud@ecu.schedula / Schedula@123).
Returns the authenticated user from the auth_token cookie. Run after Sign In.
Issues a new auth_token from the refresh_token cookie. No body needed.
Revokes refresh_token in DB and clears both cookies.
Sends a reset link. In dev mode, returns resetToken in the body — auto-saved to {{resetToken}}.

response.name: 200 OK (dev: resetToken included)

request.description: Resets password using {{resetToken}} from Forgot Password. Password must be 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, number.

response.name: 400 Invalid/expired token

request.description: Coordinator invites a professor/ta/student. Requires active coordinator session. In dev mode, inviteToken is returned in body.
Invited user activates their account using {{inviteToken}} from Invite response.
Resends the verification email for an unverified account. Use with the address from Sign Up.
Returns whether BYPASS_AUTH=true is set in the server environment.

item.name: Coordinator — Setup
item.description: Institution configuration. Sign in as coordinator first.

request.description: Returns ECU institution config seeded by seed-ecu.mjs.
Saves institution settings. Body matches the seeded ECU configuration.

item.name: Coordinator — Groups / Levels
item.description: ECU has 5 levels: Freshman (L0), L1, L2, L3, L4 with groups GA/GB and G1/G2/G3.

request.description: Returns the ECU level/group structure seeded by seed-ecu.mjs.
Saves the ECU group structure. Body matches what seed-ecu.mjs writes.

item.name: Coordinator — Courses
item.description: ECU has 32 courses across L0-L4. All seeded by seed-ecu.mjs with staff already assigned.

exec: console.log('courseId set to first result:', res.courses[0].id, '—', res.courses[0].code);

request.description: Returns all 32 seeded ECU courses. Auto-saves first courseId to {{courseId}}.
Filter by level. ECU has 6 L3 courses: SET321, SET322, SET323, SET372, SET374, SET393.
Creates a new course. Uses {{staffId}} and {{taId}} — populate those from List Staff first.
Updates the course at {{courseId}}. Populate courseId from List or Create Course.
Soft-deletes the course at {{courseId}}. Use a course created by 'Create Course' to avoid deleting seeded data.

item.name: Coordinator — Staff
item.description: ECU has 20 professors and 38 TAs seeded. All use password Schedula@123.

request.description: Returns all seeded staff. Auto-saves first professor to {{staffId}} and first TA to {{taId}}.
Creates a staff member with invite_status: pending and sends invite email.
Updates name/role for the staff member at {{staffId}}.
Downloads all staff as a CSV file.

item.name: Coordinator — Assign
item.description: All 32 courses already have professors and TAs assigned from seed-ecu.mjs.

request.description: Returns all courses with their assigned professors/TAs plus available staff list.
Assigns {{staffId}} to {{courseId}}. Populate both from List Courses and List Staff.

item.name: Coordinator — Availability Status
item.description: 58 staff have availability pre-seeded for Spring 2026.

request.description: Returns availability submission status. All 58 seeded staff should show submitted:true.
Returns counts of courses, staff, and rooms currently in the DB.
Dry-run validation. Use import-json-test/courses.csv or courses-sample.json from the project root.
Writes import data to DB. type: courses | staff | rooms | enrollments.

item.name: Coordinator — Schedule: Generate
item.description: Run solver against the full ECU dataset (32 courses, 58 staff, 5 levels).

request.description: Returns readiness check and recent solver jobs. ECU data should show ready:true.
Starts the constraint solver for all ECU levels. Returns jobId. Poll 'Poll Job Status' until status:completed.
Poll with {{jobId}} from Run Solver. Status: running | completed | completed_fallback | failed
Returns sessions and conflicts for the latest generated schedule.
Publishes the reviewed schedule. After this, staff and students can see their sessions.
resolutionAction: reassign_room | reassign_staff | move_slot | accept_risk
Returns all published level schedules enriched with course and staff data.
Returns heatmap (day×slot occupancy), top rooms, and summary stats for the published schedule.

item.name: Staff
item.description: Sign in as a professor or TA first (request 03b or 03c). All staff have pre-seeded availability.

request.description: Returns profile, term, working days, and seeded availability for the signed-in staff member.
Valid days: Saturday, Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday
Returns sessions for the signed-in staff member. Requires a published schedule.

item.name: Student
item.description: Student schedule endpoint. Requires a published schedule.

request.description: Returns the published schedule for the authenticated student.

item.name: CORS — Preflight
item.description: OPTIONS preflight requests to verify CORS headers. No auth needed.

item.name: No Auth — Expect 401
item.description: Each request injects an invalid auth_token cookie via pre-request script, proving every protected endpoint rejects unauthenticated requests. No setup required.
